info.title: How Credits Work
info.validity: Standard packages valid for 180 days, Enterprise packages valid for 360 days. Credits can be used across multiple campaigns within the validity period. Credits are non-refundable once purchased.

success.title: Payment Successful!
success.message: Your credits have been added to your account and are ready to use.
success.info: Credits have been automatically added to your balance. You can now use them to launch review campaigns for your books.
